modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print to a specific folder in ImageNow.

full_description_text: User needs to print in ImageNow. They want to print to a specific folder. There’s confusion on how to do this. Printing issues are affecting workflow.
short_description: Unable to print to a specific folder in ImageNow.
description: User needs to print in ImageNow. They want to print to a specific folder. There’s confusion on how to do this. Printing issues are affecting workflow.
